message:
test(core): add comprehensive PRAGMA state tests for connection-level knobs

Add 14 new unit tests in connection.rs covering the connection-scoped
PRAGMA machinery introduced for E2E harness fairness (bd-1w6k.2.3):

- journal_mode: default (wal), set/query cycle, invalid mode rejection
- synchronous: default (NORMAL), set by name and integer code
- cache_size: default (-2000), set/query cycle
- page_size: default (4096), set valid power-of-two, reject invalid
  (non-power-of-two, below 512, above 65536)
- busy_timeout: default (5000ms), set/query cycle
- pragma_state() accessor: verify all five fields reflect PRAGMA changes
- concurrent_mode: verify query returns integer 0/1 and set returns value

These tests exercise the full apply_connection_pragma() dispatch path
through Connection::execute_pragma(), ensuring both the VDBE pragma
module and the core connection wiring are correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
